background: Pandora Smith is 24 years old women, who works a part time job as a convenience store cashier, she doesn't really take her job that serious, as she always on her phone and try to see if she can hook up with any hung stud with a huge Cock, few days ago, her boss assigned her with another work and that is to an advertiser for their Christmas product, she didn't mind because she thought about making a quick money, but her boss had another plan to attract customers, he give her a christmas bikini, she know this would be a bad a idea but she needed the money no matter what, even if it means wearing a christmas bikini in the cold weather.
